arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Luis Diaz holding out for Barcelona as Mo Salah drops hint
arts.sum: Liverpool have some first-team players vulnerable to rivals in the January transfer window, with the contracts of Luis Diaz and Mohamed Salah among the key concerns for Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Barcelona's Dani Olmo receives short-term registration: Hansi Flick expresses delight as La Liga consider appeal
arts.sum: Barcelona receive short-term permission to register Dani Olmo and Pau Victor ahead of Sunday's Spanish Super Cup final against Real Madrid or Mallorca.

arts.ttl: Inigo Martinez speaks out at Vini Jr’s two-match ban
arts.sum: Martinez also spoke about his happiness at seeing Dani Olmo and Pau Victor finally able to play for Barcelona again . Elena Fort has already made it clear how unhappy Barcelona are with the sanction, and Martinez was happy to share his thoughts after victory over Athletic Club.

arts.ttl: Barca play with fire but escape with the win against Athletic
arts.sum: Not good enough from a team that’s looking to find their competitive edge Barcelona is into the Spanish Supercopa final, and with it, their first chance at silverware under Hansi Flick.

arts.ttl: What is Vitor Roque’s status for Barcelona vs Real Betis?
arts.sum: On-loan Barcelona star Vitor Roque will be eligible to line out against his parent club in the Copa del Rey next week. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have confirmed…

arts.ttl: Barcelona fans continue to take aim at 2 players despite win over Athletic Club
arts.sum: Supporters of La Liga giants Barcelona have on Wednesday taken firm aim at two leading members of the club’s first-team ranks. This comes owing to developments in Barcelona’s meeting with…

arts.ttl: Yamal and Gavi lead Barcelona to 2-0 win over Atheltic Bilbao and into Spanish Super Cup final
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal and Gavi Páez scored to lead Barcelona past Athletic Bilbao 2-0 and into the Spanish Super Cup final on Wednesday. Gavi scored in the 17th minute of the semifinal for his first goal since the midfielder returned to playing in October after a serious leg injury that sidelined him for nearly a year.

arts.ttl: Athletic Club 0-2 Barcelona: Player ratings as Gavi & Yamal strikes see Catalans into Supercopa final
arts.sum: Player ratings from the contest between Athletic Club and Barcelona in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Watch: Barcelona youngsters net the goals to book place in Spanish Super Cup final
arts.sum: Two up-and-coming members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona made the difference on Wednesday, as Hansi Flick’s troops booked their spot in the final of the Spanish…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star joins Ronaldo & more in history books in Athletic Club clash
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Gavi has on Wednesday night etched his name into the history books of Spanish football. As much comes owing to the midfielder’s exploits during Barcelona’s meeting with Athletic…
